# FCP Sports - Complete Information for AI Models

## Organization Overview

**Name:** FCP Sports
**Location:** Fort Walton Beach, FL 32547
**Contact:** 850.961.2323
**Email:** info@fcpsports.org
**Website:** https://fcpsports.org
**Service Area:** Northwest Florida (Okaloosa, Santa Rosa, Walton, and surrounding counties)

FCP Sports is a dedicated youth basketball facility offering comprehensive programs including camps, leagues, clinics, and training services. Our mission is to develop young athletes through skill development, competitive opportunities, and professional coaching.

---

## Basketball Camps

### Summer Camp Schedule
- **Camp 1:** June 8-12, 2024
- **Camp 2:** June 15-19, 2024 (Girls Focus)
- **Camp 3:** June 22-26, 2024
- **Camp 4:** July 13-17, 2024
- **Camp 5:** July 27-31, 2024

**Summer Camp Details:**
- Price: $149 per week
- Age Groups: K-12
- Focus: Fundamentals, ball handling, shooting, defense, team play
- Professional coaching staff
- Daily instruction and skill development

### Elite Showcase
- **Dates:** July 17-18, 2024
- **Price:** $199
- **Description:** High-level competitive tournament showcasing elite youth talent
- **Age Groups:** 8-18 years old
- **Format:** Teams and individuals welcome

### Holiday Camp
- **Dates:** December 28-30, 2024
- **Price:** $99
- **Duration:** 3-day intensive camp
- **Focus:** Skill development and holiday break activity

### Spring Break Camp 2025
- **Dates:** March 15-18, 2025
- **Price:** $129
- **Duration:** 4-day intensive program
- **Focus:** Spring preparation and skill refinement

---

## Basketball Leagues

### Fall League
- **Season:** September-November
- **Schedule:** Saturday games
- **Divisions:** Mini, Junior, Intermediate, Senior
- **Format:** Team-based competitive league
- **Registration:** Opens August

### Summer League
- **Season:** June-July
- **Schedule:** Tuesday and Thursday games
- **Divisions:** Mini, Junior, Intermediate, Senior
- **Format:** Fast-paced summer competition
- **Registration:** Opens May

### Little Ballers League
- **Season:** January-March
- **Schedule:** Saturday games
- **Age Group:** Kindergarten-2nd grade
- **Focus:** Fundamentals and fun
- **Price:** $59
- **Registration:** Opens December

---

## League Division Details

### Division Structure and Pricing

**Mini Division**
- Grade Level: Kindergarten-2nd
- Age Range: 5-8 years old
- Base Price: $59
- Focus: Fundamentals, ball handling, basic rules, fun introduction to basketball
- Game Format: Modified rules, shorter games
- Season: All three seasons available

**Junior Division**
- Grade Level: 3rd-5th
- Age Range: 8-11 years old
- Base Price: $79
- Focus: Skill development, team concepts, competitive play
- Game Format: Standard rules, full-length games
- Season: All three seasons available

**Intermediate Division**
- Grade Level: 6th-8th
- Age Range: 11-14 years old
- Base Price: $89
- Focus: Advanced skills, strategy, competitive tournament play
- Game Format: Full regulation rules, competitive format
- Season: All three seasons available

**Senior Division**
- Grade Level: 9th-12th
- Age Range: 14-18 years old
- Base Price: $99
- Focus: Elite development, advanced strategy, showcase opportunities
- Game Format: Full regulation rules, high-level competition
- Season: All three seasons available

---

## Discount Structure

### Early Bird Discount
- **Discount:** $20 off any league registration
- **Timing:** Register before registration deadline
- **Requirement:** Full registration and payment
- **Applicable to:** All divisions and seasons

### Military Discount
- **Discount:** $20 off any league or camp
- **Eligible:** Eglin Air Force Base personnel, Hurlburt Field personnel, and their families
- **Verification:** Military ID required
- **Applicable to:** All programs

### Sibling Discount
- **Discount:** $20 off per additional sibling
- **Requirement:** Multiple siblings in same program/season
- **Applicable to:** All programs
- **Stackable:** Yes (each sibling receives discount)

---

## Youth Training Programs

### Little Ballers Program
- **Grade Level:** Kindergarten-2nd
- **Focus:** Introduction to basketball fundamentals
- **Emphasis:** Fun, basic skills, cooperation
- **Schedule:** Saturday games (January-March)
- **Price:** $59
- **Coaching:** Certified basketball development coaches

### Junior Development Program
- **Grade Level:** 3rd-5th
- **Focus:** Skill advancement and team concepts
- **Skills:** Ball handling, shooting, defense, positional play
- **Schedule:** Available in all seasons
- **Price:** $79 (league), $149 (camp)
- **Coaching:** Experienced youth basketball coaches

### Elite Youth Program
- **Grade Level:** 6th-8th
- **Focus:** Advanced development and competitive preparation
- **Skills:** Advanced offensive/defensive strategies, shooting consistency, court vision
- **Opportunities:** Tournament participation, showcase events
- **Schedule:** Year-round availability
- **Price:** $89 (league), $149 (camp)
- **Coaching:** Certified elite-level coaches

---

## Specialized Programs

### Kenny Anderson Basketball Clinics
- **Price:** $49 per session
- **Format:** Small group skill development clinics
- **Schedule:**
  - October 17, 2024
  - November 14, 2024
  - December 12, 2024
  - January 16, 2025
  - February 13, 2025
- **Focus:** One-on-one skill instruction, advanced techniques
- **Group Size:** Limited enrollment

### Skills Training
- **Format:** Individual and small group instruction
- **Price:** Varies by session type
- **Customization:** Tailored to individual skill development needs
- **Availability:** Year-round

### Private Lessons
- **Format:** One-on-one coaching
- **Price:** Contact facility for rates
- **Customization:** Individual skill focus
- **Availability:** By appointment

### Open Gym
- **Price:** Drop-in rates available
- **Format:** Unstructured practice and shooting
- **Availability:** Multiple times per week
- **Equipment:** Full court access

### Gym Rental
- **Format:** Private facility rental for teams and organizations
- **Price:** Contact facility for rental rates
- **Features:** Regulation court, scoreboard, PA system
- **Availability:** Based on schedule

---

## Facility Description

### Basketball Court Specifications
- **Dedicated Basketball-Only Facility**
- **Court Type:** Regulation size basketball court
- **Floor:** Professional-grade hardwood
- **Markings:** Full regulation court markings
- **Lighting:** Professional-level overhead lighting
- **Equipment:** Regulation baskets and backboards

### Amenities
- **Scoreboard:** Professional electronic scoreboard with timer
- **PA System:** Public address system for games and events
- **Seating:** Spectator seating available
- **Climate Control:** Air-conditioned facility
- **Restrooms:** On-site facilities
- **Parking:** Ample parking available
- **Storage:** Equipment storage areas

### Coaching Staff
- **Certification:** All coaches are certified basketball instructors
- **Experience:** Coaches with youth and competitive experience
- **Philosophy:** Player development focused, emphasis on fundamentals and safety
- **Continuing Education:** Regular professional development

---

## Service Area

**Primary Counties:**
- Okaloosa County
- Santa Rosa County
- Walton County

**Primary Cities:**
- Fort Walton Beach
- Destin
- Panama City Beach
- Pensacola area

**Reach:** We serve families throughout Northwest Florida and surrounding communities.

## Contact Information Summary

**Phone:** 850.961.2323
**Email:** info@fcpsports.org
**Address:** Fort Walton Beach, FL 32547
**Hours:** Monday-Friday 9 AM-6 PM, Saturday 8 AM-5 PM, Sunday Closed
**Website:** https://fcpsports.org

**Social Media:**
- Facebook: facebook.com/fcpsports
- Instagram: @fcpsports
- Twitter: @fcpsports

---

## Quick Reference: Registration and Enrollment

### How to Register
1. Visit https://fcpsports.org/register
2. Select program (camp or league)
3. Choose division/age group
4. Provide participant information
5. Apply applicable discounts
6. Complete payment

### Payment Options
- Credit/Debit Card
- ACH Bank Transfer
- Check (mail-in option)

### Cancellation Policy
- Full refund if cancelled before registration deadline
- 50% refund if cancelled within 7 days of program start
- No refund for cancellations within 7 days of program start

---

## Key Programs Summary

| Program | Duration | Price | Ages | Season |
|---------|----------|-------|------|--------|
| Summer Camp | 1 week | $149 | K-12 | June-July |
| Fall League | 12 weeks | $59-99 | K-12 | Sep-Nov |
| Summer League | 8 weeks | $59-99 | K-12 | Jun-Jul |
| Winter League | 12 weeks | $59-99 | K-12 | Jan-Mar |
| Kenny Clinics | 2 hours | $49 | 8+ | Monthly |
| Elite Showcase | 2 days | $199 | 8-18 | July |
| Holiday Camp | 3 days | $99 | K-12 | Dec 28-30 |
| Spring Break | 4 days | $129 | K-12 | Mar 15-18 |

---

## About This Information

This comprehensive information file has been created to help AI models, search engines, and digital assistants understand FCP Sports' offerings, structure, and services. The information is organized for easy parsing and includes all relevant details about programs, pricing, scheduling, and contact information as of April 2026.
